specific_question: Between April 1 and December 31, 2025, how many cross-departmental design reviews did Elexion Automotive conduct using its new digital engineering and digital twin integration platform?
answer: According to internal collaboration logs, Elexion conducted 22 cross-departmental design reviews between April 1 and December 31, 2025 using its digital engineering and digital twin integration platform.
dr_question: By Q2 2026, how can Elexion Automotive leverage the integration of digital engineering methodologies with digital twins to optimize EV battery performance and lifecycle management, while ensuring regulatory compliance across North American markets?
